title: Precarious Shears
description: Upon pickup, remove [blue]2[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold] and lose [blue]16[/blue] HP.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Upon pickup, you select 2 cards to remove from your deck and take 16 damage. This is a high-risk relic that provides deck refinement at a significant health cost.
